expressions.english: pocket money; allowance
expressions.notes: 용돈 = pocket money; allowance

expressions.english: small change
expressions.notes: 잔돈 = (size) to be fine; to be little

expressions.english: to earn money
expressions.notes: 벌다 = to earn

expressions.english: to spend money
expressions.notes: 쓰다 = to use; to spend (+ money)

expressions.english: to pay back, return money
expressions.notes: 갚다 = to pay back

expressions.english: to borrow money
expressions.notes: 빌리다 = to borrow; to rent

expressions.english: to lack money; to be short on money
expressions.notes: 모자라다 = to lack; to be short of, insufficient

expressions.english: I don't have money.
expressions.notes: 없다 = to not have, not exist; to be not there

expressions.english: Give me some money.
expressions.notes:
좀 = a little; please
주다 = to give
-(으)세요 = (polite) imperative

expressions.english: I want to make a lot of money.
expressions.notes: -고 싶다 = to want to + V

expressions.english: I wish I had a lot of money.
expressions.notes: -았/었으면 좋겠다 = I wish + S + V-ed

expressions.english: Can you lend me some money?
expressions.notes:
빌려주다 = to lend
-(으)ㄹ 수 있다 = can, to be able to; there is a chance that + S + V

expressions.english: I don't have much money in my wallet.
expressions.notes: 지갑 = wallet, purse

expressions.english: There is no way I can pay you back.
expressions.notes: 방법 = method, way

expressions.english: I spent all my money buying clothes.
expressions.notes:
옷 = clothes, outfit
사다 = to buy
-느라 = for + V-ing, while + V-ing
다 = all; every (thing)

expressions.english: Just because you have a lot of money doesn't mean you are happy.
expressions.notes:
-다고 = just because; saying that + S + V
행복하다 = to be happy

expressions.korean: 이번 달에는 돈을 너무 많이 썼어요.
expressions.english: I've spent too much money this month.
expressions.notes:
이번 = this; this time
달 = month

expressions.korean: 세상에는 돈으로 살 수 없는 것들이 더 많아요.
expressions.english: There are many things in life that you can't buy with money.
expressions.notes:
세상 = world
-(으)로 = by; with
살 = to buy; to live
수 없다 = to be unable to + V; can't

expressions.korean: 돈을 버는 것도 중요하지만 쓰는 것도 중요해요.
expressions.english: Making money is important, but spending money is also important.
expressions.notes: 중요하다 = to be important

expressions.korean: 저 신발을 사고 싶은데 돈이 모자라서 못 샀어요.
expressions.english: I want to buy shoes, but I can't because I don't have enough money.
expressions.notes: 못-것다 = I don't think + S + can + V
